prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次分别为 5458→6447→5731→4834→5336，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字增大=竞争加剧）。2024 年位次前移至 4834 后，2025 年回退至 5336，近两年累计后移约 502 名；2025 年基准位次约 5336 名；该校在云南理科/物理类招生计划：2021 年 40 人→2022 年 36 人→2023 年 37 人→2024 年 37 人→2025 年 48 人→2026 年 52 人，2026 年较 2025 年扩招 4 人（+8.3%），扩招趋势明显，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在 44–45 位，2026 年升至第 42 位，在理工类高校中位居前列，学校层次和综合实力对考生有持续吸引力；2022 年曾因校园安全事件出现偏负面舆情，但近年声誉平稳恢复；抖音综合热度排名第 34 位（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评 A+（全国顶尖），化学 A-，控制科学与工程 A-；化工、材料、控制等学科实力突出，与该校理工特色高度一致，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业近年持续高热推荐，与华东理工大学的优势工科方向高度契合，推高相关专业报考热度；本省 2026 年高考总人数约 37.79 万，物理类估算约 22.9 万人，较 2025 年物理类 17.33 万人增加约 32%，竞争明显加剧；华东理工大学位于上海市，一线城市区位优势对云南考生有较强吸引力；该校在云南招生占比约 2%-3%，属跨省招生中占比中等偏低的省份，地域偏好因素对位次有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 5336、2026 年扩招 4 人（+8.3%）、本省物理类考生大幅增加约 32%、学校排名小幅提升、声誉平稳、上海地域吸引力强等因素，再结合考生规模激增的竞争压力做小幅上修。预测 2026 年最低位次约 5653 名，区间 5153–6153 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were 5458→6447→5731→4834→5336, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (larger ranking numbers indicate increased competition). After advancing to 4834 in 2024, the ranking retreated to 5336 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 502 positions over the past two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5336. The enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia's Science/Physics Category: 40 in 2021→36 in 2022→37 in 2023→37 in 2024→48 in 2025→52 in 2026, with an increase of 4 students (+8.3%) in 2026 compared to 2025, indicating a clear expansion trend, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science China University Ranking has been stable at positions 44–45 in recent years, rising to 42nd in 2026, ranking among the top in science and engineering universities, with the university's level and comprehensive strength continuously attracting students; there was negative public opinion in 2022 due to a campus safety incident, but reputation has steadily recovered in recent years; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 34th (relatively popular), with medium to high exposure on short video platforms, and no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A+ (top in the country), Chemistry A-, Control Science and Engineering A-; the university has outstanding strengths in chemical engineering, materials, control, and other disciplines, highly consistent with its science and engineering characteristics, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently popular in recent years, highly aligned with the advantageous engineering fields of East China University of Science and Technology, driving up application enthusiasm for related majors; the total number of Gaokao candidates in this province in 2026 is approximately 377,900, with an estimated 229,000 in the Physics Category, an increase of about 32% compared to 173,300 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; East China University of Science and Technology is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city with strong regional appeal to Ningxia candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Ningxia is about 2%-3%, a relatively low proportion among cross-provincial enrollments, with regional preference factors providing some support for rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5336, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 4 students (+8.3%), a significant increase of about 32% in the province's Physics Category candidates, a slight rise in university ranking, stable reputation, strong regional appeal of Shanghai, and the competitive pressure from the surge in candidate numbers, a slight upward adjustment is made. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 5653, with a range of 5153–6153.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 5653, range 5153–6153. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 5153 are advised to focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science, Intelligence and Robotics, Electronic Information; candidates around 5653 should target Tier 2 flagship/specialty majors like Smart Chemical Engineering, Mechanical, Biomedicine as the main direction, while also attempting Tier 1; candidates near the upper limit of 6153 should use Tier 3 majors such as Energy and Environment, Bioengineering, Pharmacy as safety options, while also striving for some Tier 2 majors. East China University of Science and Technology's Chemical Engineering A+ discipline is outstanding, and related Engineering Experimental Classes offer high value for money, worthy of focused attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
In 2023, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 66th, in 2024 it was approximately 52nd, and in 2025 it was approximately 68th for history category; the rankings fluctuated between 52nd and 68th over the past three years, with a slight backward shift in 2025 compared to 2024, setting a baseline ranking of approximately 68th; the 2025 history category enrollment plan was 11 students, while the 2026 plan is 13 students, an increase of approximately 18.2% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, theoretically easing competition slightly, but the impact of expansion on top-tier university rankings is limited.
3. [School Level] 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 3rd on the Soft Science Main Ranking from 2021 to 2026, firmly among the top universities nationwide, maintaining strong appeal to candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety incidents, but as a top 3 university nationwide, Zhejiang University has strong reputation resilience, with limited impact on top candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 14th (high heat), with high short video exposure and significant application attention. It has 39 A- or above disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, and Optical Engineering, all rated A+, demonstrating extremely strong academic strength and outstanding appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely aligning with Zhejiang University's advantageous disciplines; in 2026, the number of history category candidates in Ningxia is approximately 21,437, roughly the same as in 2025, indicating a stable competitive landscape; provincial control line data has been incorporated for reference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 68th, the 2026 history category enrollment expansion of approximately 18.2% (from 11 to 13 students), the roughly unchanged total number of candidates, and the continuous attraction of top-tier school status for high-scoring candidates, the expansion has a slight downward effect on rankings (ranking number increases), but the school's top reputation and advantageous disciplines create a counterbalance; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for history category in 2026 will be approximately 73rd, with a range of 65th to 81st.
